summary: Completed comprehensive testing of NDA signing system. All backend endpoints pass (22/22 tests). Frontend flows verified: NDA list with status badges, create NDA page with pre-filled sender info and signature canvas, public signing page with verification, NDA read flow showing all 9 legal sections, sign phase with recipient form and signature canvas, and admin detail view with timeline. Role-based docs access working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Created test NDA during pytest execution (Test Recipient / testrecp@example.com / 5551112222)
context_for_next_testing_agent: NDA system fully functional. Backend tests cover: create NDA, list NDAs, get NDA detail, public NDA info, verify with wrong credentials (403), verify with correct credentials (200), send email, submit signature, verify signed status, cannot delete signed NDA, cannot re-sign NDA, delete unsigned NDA, 404 for nonexistent NDA, existing John Smith NDA verification, existing Jane Doe NDA verification. Docs RBAC tests cover: super_admin can list all docs including NDA with required_role=super_admin, super_admin can get NDA doc, super_admin can get operations manual (no role restriction), unauthorized access returns 401, role-based filtering query works. Frontend verified: NDA list page shows all NDAs with status badges (SIGNED/VIEWED/PENDING), create page has pre-filled sender info (Forest Ward, Founder & CEO), signature canvas, recipient info form, public signing page has verification form (email+phone), after verification shows full NDA with 9 legal sections, sign phase has recipient form (name/title/company) and signature canvas, admin detail view shows both parties' signatures and timeline. Twilio SMS is MOCKED. Resend Email is LIVE.
